title: Hierarchical Constraint Law
statement: Recursive adaptive frameworks organize through hierarchical constraint inheritance.
interpretation: Interpretive structure must remain consistent with observable dynamics; observable dynamics must remain consistent with phase structure; phase structure must remain consistent with viability constraints; viability constraints must remain consistent with underlying accessibility geometry.
governance_role: Prevents circular ontology, abstraction drift, and unconstrained interpretation.
one_sentence_lock: Interpretation is downstream of observable dynamics, which are downstream of phase dynamics, coordination, viability, and geometry.
